title: Add support for No new privs
body: Also add new tests for other security checks.

comments.body: Needs DB changes to save NoNewPrivs in ContainerConfig

@mheon I don't think we need to save this, since it is part or the security opt?  If you do a podman inspect you will see the nonewprivs flag, just like you do in Docker.

I did notice that we need to save --privilege flag.
If it's in ContainerConfig it needs to be saved - we need to keep it around for Exec and Inspect
@mheon I did not think of Exec, I have added it to the config.
LGTM, though we should hold off on merging until the queue clears
@bot retest this please
bot, retest this please
bot, retest this please
I think this is failing because it needs a new container-selinux in Fedora to pass.

@rhatdan I'm working on some DB changes to let @baude proceed with DNS work. I'm thinking about including the DB changes from here and #220 at the same time so we don't have 3 PRs out at once changing the DB. Any objections?

Nope since I am waiting for packages to be udpated, so I can pass tests. I will rebase once your stuff gets in.
Make sure you add privileged as well.
